overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside the NCART metro train in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City, traveling through an elevated rail system at night. The journey passes through tunnels, stations, and dense urban canyons filled with holographic advertisements and neon-lit skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro tunnel emerging into urban canyon

events.description: train exits dark tunnel into illuminated Night City skyline
onboard announcement for next stop: Japantown South

agents.ego_description: passenger looking out window as train emerges from tunnel into the city

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel interior visible through train window
illuminated metro line map showing train route in red and yellow
green metal window frame of the train cabin
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows becoming visible
large purple holographic advertisement on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark concrete tunnel with the NCART route map visible on the right. As the train moves forward, it emerges around 3 seconds into the Night City skyline, revealing illuminated skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The environment transitions from enclosed darkness to an open urban canyon with neon lighting.

events.description: entering Japantown South station with bright cyan neon illumination
exiting station platform back into darker urban environment

agents.ego_description: passenger passing through the illuminated station without stopping

entered.detail: illuminated station name sign in bright cyan neon
intense blue-cyan lighting illuminating the station interior
concrete platform edge with safety barriers

segments.scene_description: The train rapidly passes through Japantown South station, characterized by intense cyan neon lighting and the station name sign. The platform appears empty. After a brief 4-second passage, the train exits back into the darker urban canyon between buildings.

events.description: entering darker section with minimal lighting and green corporate signage
onboard announcement for next stop: Monroe and Sagan

agents.ego_description: traveling through a darker, narrower section of the elevated rail between buildings

entered.detail: building facade with illuminated green corporate logo signage

segments.scene_description: The train travels through a darker, more enclosed urban canyon with reduced lighting. A building with green corporate signage is visible on the left. The segment ends with an announcement for the upcoming Monroe and Sagan station.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering dense commercial district with numerous holographic billboards
passing close to building structures temporarily blocking view
arriving at Monroe and Sagan station platform

agents.ego_description: approaching final destination through a corridor of bright advertisements and neon signs

entered.detail: tall vertical advertisement for All Foods with colorful floral design
large holographic billboard displaying health warning with red background
station platform with illuminated Monroe and Sagan signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment travels through a dense commercial district filled with holographic advertisements including the All Foods vertical sign and health warning billboards. The train passes through narrow sections between buildings before arriving at the Monroe and Sagan station, where the platform and station signage become visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic darkness of a transit tunnel into the neon-saturated expanse of Night City's commercial districts. It begins within a dark concrete tunnel beside an NCART route map before emerging into an open urban canyon filled with illuminated skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The scene then shifts rapidly through the intense cyan glow of the Japantown South station, momentarily brightening the view before plunging back into a darker corridor marked by green corporate signage. As the train continues, the environment expands into a dense commercial hub dominated by the All Foods vertical sign and health warning billboards. The movement finally concludes as the train glides into the Monroe and Sagan station, where the platform and station signage come into clear view.
